homepage.heroHeadline: Sister-Owned General & Special Care Dentistry in Fountain Valley, CA
homepage.heroSubheadline: We are a patient-centered practice that specializes in general, family, and special care dentistry. You can count on us to provide you with the best care possible, using the best materials and technology, in a safe and friendly environment.
homepage.heroTagline: Every patient deserves a dental home.
homepage.valueProp: Elements Dentistry is a sister-owned practice founded by Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo to provide comprehensive, compassionate dental care — including specialized care for medically complex and special needs patients — right here in Fountain Valley, CA.

about.headline: Born and Raised in Fountain Valley — Built to Serve Our Community
about.introParagraph: Drs. Tiffany & Trisha Vo are sisters, who were born and raised in Fountain Valley, CA. They graduated from the prestigious University of the Pacific Arthur A. Dugoni School of Dentistry in San Francisco. With a combined 17 years of experience, Drs. Tiffany & Trisha Vo always prioritize patient comfort & autonomy. This led to the sisters' founding of Elements Dentistry as a dental practice focused on providing comprehensive and emergency dental care for special care and medically compromised patients and their families. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha envision Elements Dentistry as a safe place for all patients to receive humanistic and quality dental care.
about.philosophy:
Our Core Values

Prevention: We prioritize preventing oral diseases & treat only when needed.

Education: We are committed to educating our patients throughout the entire treatment process.

Collaboration: You can rest assured knowing that our dentists collaborate with each other & with you to achieve the best results.

Innovation: We invest in advanced technology and evidence-based techniques — including GentleWave endodontics, digital intraoral scanning, and KöR Whitening — so our patients benefit from the most current and effective care available.
about.closingCTA: Ready to schedule? | Book an Appointment

special-care-dentistry.headline: Special Care Dentistry
special-care-dentistry.subheadline: Compassionate dental care for patients with physical, medical, developmental, or cognitive conditions in Fountain Valley, CA
special-care-dentistry.intro:
Special Care Dentistry is the branch of dentistry that provides oral care services for people with physical, medical, developmental, or cognitive conditions which limit their ability to receive routine dental care.

At Elements Dentistry, we understand that as our loved ones age out of pediatric care or require geriatric care, it can be difficult to find a dental home where they feel comfortable and that avoids sending them directly to hospitals. Often, we find our patients have had to wait lengthy hospital enrollment periods and then wait again for space in the operating room, without any dental care in the transitional period.

Our goal at Elements Dentistry is to create a space where our patients can do as much or as little treatment as they feel comfortable, progressing toward dental health at their pace. Both Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo believe that all special care patients deserve a dental home (whether transitional or permanent) where they are treated with dignity and respect. Our doctors have extensive experience treating patients with special needs, including patients with Alzheimer's dementia, autism, and Down Syndrome.

Sometimes, that means that your loved one's first dental visit to Elements Dentistry might literally mean a simple visit to the reception area. Our doctors are happy to meet patients and their families face-to-face there, giving space for the patient to get to know the dental team without any pressure. We're happy to give in-person tours of the office as well, to show how the dental treatment rooms can be modified to accommodate your loved one's physical limitations. We even have yoga mats for patients who prefer having the team at their level, and a Weighted Wallaby Blanket to help with relaxation during visits.
benefits: Low-pressure first visits — even a reception area introduction counts
Modified treatment rooms for patients with physical limitations
Weighted Wallaby Blanket available for relaxation
Yoga mats for patients who prefer floor-level space
Tell-Show-Do desensitization technique for anxious patients
Dr. Trisha completed a GPR with emphasis on special care dentistry at Rancho Los Amigos
Dr. Trisha completed a dental oncology externship at Stanford Hospital
Experience with Alzheimer's, autism, Down Syndrome, and medically complex conditions

Specialized care for medically complex and special needs patients
Special care for patients with Alzheimer's, autism, Down Syndrome

sedation-dentistry.headline: Sedation Dentistry
sedation-dentistry.subheadline: Safe sedation dentistry options in Fountain Valley, CA
sedation-dentistry.intro:
We are proud to provide different options for patients that require sedation for the completion of dental treatment. Sedation is a great option for patients who have extreme anxiety or are unable to tolerate traditional dental treatment. One of the most commonly used types of sedation is nitrous oxide, which is also known as laughing gas. This helps many patients relax during their procedure. We also work with medical and dental anesthesiologists to provide safe general anesthesia services for patients in our office.

Dr. Trisha Vo is one of a select group of general dentists in Orange County that is credentialed with MobiSurg, a surgery center located in Laguna Hills, CA. This is a great option for patients with Kaiser Permanente Health Insurance Plans that require general anesthesia services for complete dental rehabilitation or for patients with more complex medical conditions.
benefits: Nitrous oxide (laughing gas) for mild anxiety
IV sedation administered under anesthesiologist supervision
General anesthesia available in-office with a medical anesthesiologist
Dr. Trisha credentialed with MobiSurg surgery center in Laguna Hills, CA
Option available for Kaiser Permanente members requiring general anesthesia
differentiatorsWoven: MobiSurg surgery center credentialed general dentist
Kaiser Permanente general anesthesia services available
In-office anesthesiologist for IV and general anesthesia
Sister-owned dental practice with combined 17 years experience

orthosnap-clear-aligners.headline: Orthosnap Clear Aligners
orthosnap-clear-aligners.subheadline: Clear Aligner Treatment in Fountain Valley, CA
orthosnap-clear-aligners.intro:
Orthosnap is a cost-effective and efficient clear aligner therapy that helps our patients straighten their teeth or correct their bite, without the unsightly appearance of traditional metal braces. By utilizing custom-made dental appliances, clear aligner therapy applies gentle pressure to the teeth to move them into the desired position. Elements Dentistry chose Orthosnap for their best-fitting trays in the industry, enabling quick and accurate tooth movement — making it an excellent option for any and all budgets.

Gone are the days of gag-inducing, goopy impression materials. At Elements Dentistry, we pride ourselves on being a digital practice. We use an intraoral scanner to take a precise digital impression of your teeth, which we then use to create your custom-made clear aligners.
benefits: Cost-effective clear aligner option for all budgets
Best-fitting trays in the industry for accurate tooth movement
Fully digital impressions — no goopy materials
Custom-made aligners created from intraoral scanner data
Discreet alternative to traditional metal braces
differentiatorsWoven: Orthosnap clear aligners for all budgets
Orthosnap best-fitting clear aligner trays in industry
Fully digital intraoral scanner for impressions

k-r-whitening.headline: KöR Whitening
k-r-whitening.subheadline: Gentle & Deep Teeth Whitening in Fountain Valley, CA
k-r-whitening.intro:
Have you struggled with deep stains from years of coffee consumption or from tetracycline staining? Have you tried whitening strips to no avail and increased teeth sensitivity? Professional teeth whitening can help you achieve the bright, white smile you've always wanted. Elements Dentistry is proud to use the KöR Teeth Whitening System — a highly effective teeth bleaching system that does not cause as much teeth sensitivity as other systems or strips.

KöR was developed by Dr. Rod Kurthy using the chemistry of teeth whitening. His unique tri-barrel system keeps the bleaching elements separated until the moment of application, enabling stronger results even on the most difficult whitening cases. KöR Whitening lightens teeth dramatically — up to 16 shades or more — and is considered entirely safe, with whitening products having been clinically studied for more than three decades.
benefits: Whitens up to 16 shades or more
Effective even on tetracycline staining and deep discoloration
Causes less sensitivity than other whitening systems or strips
Unique tri-barrel system for stronger, more consistent results
Clinically studied and considered entirely safe
differentiatorsWoven: KöR Whitening System for teeth whitening
KöR Whitening system whitens up to 16 shades
KöR tri-barrel system for stronger whitening results
KöR Whitening causes less sensitivity than other systems

gentlewave.headline: GentleWave Procedure
gentlewave.subheadline: Root Canal Treatment That Promotes Pain-Free, Fast Healing in Fountain Valley, CA
gentlewave.intro:
At Elements Dentistry, we provide the GentleWave procedure for patients with root canal infections. The GentleWave Procedure is a modern approach to treating root canal infections — offering high-tech, effective cleaning designed to reach the most complex tooth anatomies where bacteria can hide.

Root canal procedures don't have to be painful. The GentleWave Procedure promotes pain-free, fast healing. And because its technology is so effective at cleaning the root canals inside a tooth, there is a high likelihood the tooth will stay clean and free of reinfection long-term.
benefits: Minimally invasive root canal treatment
Reaches complex tooth anatomies other methods may miss
Promotes pain-free, fast healing
Reduces likelihood of reinfection
Advanced multisonic endodontic technology
differentiatorsWoven: GentleWave advanced endodontic technology
GentleWave minimally invasive root canal treatment
GentleWave system for painless root canals

cosmetic-dentistry.headline: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic-dentistry.subheadline: Expert cosmetic dental care in Fountain Valley, CA
cosmetic-dentistry.intro: At Elements Dentistry, we believe that a confident smile can change everything. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo are graduates of the Kois Center — a prestigious evidence-based postdoctoral dental education program in Seattle, WA — bringing advanced clinical training to every cosmetic case. Whether you are looking to brighten your smile with KöR Whitening, correct the shape and color of your teeth with porcelain veneers, or restore damaged teeth with custom crowns, our team has the expertise and technology to help you achieve the smile you have always wanted. With a combined 17 years of experience, our doctors approach every cosmetic treatment with artistry, precision, and a commitment to results that look and feel natural.
benefits: Porcelain veneers and custom crowns
KöR Whitening — up to 16 shades brighter
Evidence-based cosmetic treatment planning from Kois Center graduates
Digital treatment previews using intraoral scanning technology
Combined 17 years of cosmetic dentistry experience

comprehensive-dental-care.headline: Comprehensive Dental Care
comprehensive-dental-care.subheadline: General, family, and special care dentistry in Fountain Valley, CA
comprehensive-dental-care.intro: Elements Dentistry was founded to provide comprehensive dental care for patients of all backgrounds and needs — from routine cleanings and preventive care to complex restorative and special care treatment. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo are Kois Center graduates with a combined 17 years of experience, and they bring evidence-based, patient-centered care to every appointment. Whether you are coming in for your first exam, managing an ongoing dental condition, or seeking care for a loved one with complex medical needs, our team is equipped to meet you where you are and guide you toward lasting oral health.

Restorative care including fillings, crowns, and bridges
Special care dentistry for medically complex patients

emergency-dental-care.headline: Emergency Dental Care
emergency-dental-care.subheadline: Urgent dental care for patients in Fountain Valley and surrounding communities
emergency-dental-care.intro: When a dental emergency strikes, having a trusted dental home makes all the difference. Elements Dentistry was founded with a mission to provide comprehensive and emergency dental care for special care and medically compromised patients and their families — but our emergency services are available to all patients in our community. Whether you are dealing with a broken tooth, a dental infection, severe pain, or another urgent concern, our team is here to help. Contact our office as soon as possible so we can get you seen quickly and comfortably in our state-of-the-art Fountain Valley office.
benefits: Emergency appointments for broken, infected, or painful teeth
Sedation options available for anxious or complex patients
Board-certified oral surgeon on staff for surgical emergencies
Founded specifically to serve medically complex and special care patients
Conveniently located near the 405 freeway in Fountain Valley
differentiatorsWoven: Sister-owned dental practice with combined 17 years experience

wisdom-teeth-extractions.headline: Wisdom Teeth Extractions
wisdom-teeth-extractions.subheadline: Expert wisdom tooth removal in Fountain Valley, CA
wisdom-teeth-extractions.intro: Wisdom teeth — the third molars at the back of the mouth — often need to be removed when they become impacted, cause crowding, or lead to infection. At Elements Dentistry, wisdom teeth extractions are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon trained at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center. When he is not at Elements Dentistry, Dr. Kalvyn serves as an attending surgeon at Los Angeles General Medical Center, where he oversees oral surgery residents for complex trauma, orthognathic, and TMJ surgeries. Patients can expect surgical-level expertise in a comfortable, familiar dental office setting — with sedation options available for those who need them.
benefits: Board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon performing all extractions
Surgical training at USC and LA General Medical Center
Sedation available for patient comfort
In-office procedure — no hospital referral required for most cases
Safe, comfortable care for patients with complex medical histories
differentiatorsWoven: Board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon on staff
Attending surgeon at LA General Medical Center

biopsies.headline: Oral Biopsies
biopsies.subheadline: Oral biopsy services in Fountain Valley, CA
biopsies.intro: An oral biopsy is a procedure in which a small sample of tissue is removed from the mouth and examined to diagnose or rule out conditions such as oral cancer, infections, or other abnormalities. At Elements Dentistry, oral biopsies are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon with advanced surgical training at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center. Dr. Kalvyn also serves as an attending surgeon at LA General Medical Center, where he oversees residents for complex oral and maxillofacial cases. If your dentist or physician has recommended an oral biopsy, our team can provide the expert care and follow-through you need.
benefits: Performed by a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon
Surgical training at USC and LA General Medical Center
Comfortable in-office procedure with sedation options available
Thorough post-procedure follow-up and care coordination
differentiatorsWoven: Board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon on staff
Attending surgeon at LA General Medical Center

tongue-tie-releases.headline: Tongue Tie Releases
tongue-tie-releases.subheadline: Frenectomy and tongue tie release in Fountain Valley, CA
tongue-tie-releases.intro: A tongue tie (ankyloglossia) occurs when the band of tissue connecting the tongue to the floor of the mouth is too tight or short, restricting movement and potentially affecting speech, feeding, or oral development. At Elements Dentistry, tongue tie releases are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon trained at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center. Dr. Kalvyn brings surgical-level precision and a patient-centered approach to every procedure. Sedation options are available to ensure the process is as comfortable as possible for both children and adults.

Appropriate for children and adults
Sedation available for patient comfort

implant-placements.headline: Implant Placements
implant-placements.subheadline: Surgical dental implant placement in Fountain Valley, CA
implant-placements.intro: Dental implant placement is a surgical procedure in which a titanium post is placed into the jawbone to serve as a stable foundation for a replacement tooth or restoration. At Elements Dentistry, implant placements are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon with advanced training at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo have pursued postgraduate implant training at the California Implant Institute and are working toward fellowship with the International Congress of Oral Implantologists (ICOI), ensuring that implant planning and restoration are handled with the same level of expertise as the surgical placement itself.

all-on-4-or-all-on-x-smiles.headline: All-On-4 or All-On-X Smiles
all-on-4-or-all-on-x-smiles.subheadline: Full-arch implant-supported smiles in Fountain Valley, CA
all-on-4-or-all-on-x-smiles.intro: All-On-4 and All-On-X are full-arch tooth replacement solutions that use a small number of strategically placed implants to support an entire arch of teeth — providing a permanent, natural-looking alternative to traditional dentures. At Elements Dentistry, these procedures are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon trained at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center, where he continues to serve as an attending surgeon overseeing complex surgical cases. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo, working toward ICOI fellowship in oral implantology, collaborate closely in the treatment planning and restorative phases to deliver a seamless result from start to finish.

clear-aligner-treatment.headline: Clear Aligner Treatment
clear-aligner-treatment.subheadline: Discreet teeth straightening in Fountain Valley, CA
clear-aligner-treatment.intro: Clear aligner treatment is a modern, discreet way to straighten teeth and correct bite issues without the look or feel of traditional metal braces. At Elements Dentistry, we offer Orthosnap clear aligners — a highly accurate and cost-effective system chosen for producing the best-fitting trays in the industry. Custom aligners are designed using our fully digital intraoral scanner, eliminating the need for goopy impression materials. Clear aligner therapy applies gentle, consistent pressure to guide teeth into their ideal positions, and is available at price points to fit any and all budgets.

dentures.headline: Dentures
dentures.subheadline: Removable and implant-supported denture options in Fountain Valley, CA
dentures.intro: Dentures are a time-tested solution for replacing multiple missing teeth, restoring your ability to eat, speak, and smile with confidence. At Elements Dentistry, Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo bring a combined 17 years of experience to the design and fitting of both full and partial dentures. We believe that every patient deserves access to quality dental care, which is why we offer a variety of financing options — including an in-office membership plan and Cherry financing — to help make treatment accessible. For patients who want the stability of a fixed solution, implant-supported options such as All-On-4 or All-On-X are also available through our board-certified oral surgeon, Dr. Kalvyn Ngo.

Combined 17 years of restorative experience

Implant-supported denture upgrade path available

veneers.headline: Veneers
veneers.subheadline: Porcelain veneers in Fountain Valley, CA
veneers.intro: Porcelain veneers are thin, custom-crafted shells bonded to the front surface of your teeth to correct chips, cracks, gaps, discoloration, or irregular shapes — delivering a dramatic smile transformation in just a few visits. At Elements Dentistry, Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo are experts in veneers and crowns, and their precision is backed by advanced training at the Kois Center, a prestigious evidence-based postdoctoral dental education program in Seattle, WA. With a combined 17 years of experience, our doctors take an artistic and evidence-based approach to veneer design, ensuring results that complement your natural features and stand the test of time.

full-mouth-reconstruction.headline: Full Mouth Reconstruction
full-mouth-reconstruction.subheadline: Comprehensive restorative care in Fountain Valley, CA
full-mouth-reconstruction.intro: Full mouth reconstruction combines restorative, surgical, and cosmetic dental treatments to rebuild the health, function, and appearance of an entire smile. It is typically recommended for patients who have experienced significant tooth loss, severe decay, advanced gum disease, bite problems, or trauma affecting multiple teeth. At Elements Dentistry, full mouth reconstruction is a collaborative effort: Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo — Kois Center graduates working toward ICOI fellowship in oral implantology — lead the restorative and cosmetic planning, while Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, our board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon, handles any surgical components including implant placements and extractions. This in-house surgical and restorative team allows us to provide coordinated, comprehensive care under one roof.
benefits: Coordinated care from surgical placement to final restoration
Board-certified oral surgeon on staff for surgical phases
Restorative planning by Kois Center-trained dentists
Both doctors working toward ICOI fellowship
Financing options available to make treatment accessible

periodontal-disease.headline: Periodontal Disease
periodontal-disease.subheadline: Gum disease treatment in Fountain Valley, CA
periodontal-disease.intro: Periodontal disease is a bacterial infection of the gums and supporting structures of the teeth that, if left untreated, can lead to significant bone loss and tooth loss. Early-stage gum disease (gingivitis) can often be reversed with improved oral hygiene and professional cleanings, while more advanced cases require deep cleaning procedures — known as scaling and root planing — to remove bacteria from below the gumline and allow the tissue to heal. At Elements Dentistry, Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo are Kois Center graduates with deep training in evidence-based periodontal management. Our goal is always to preserve your natural teeth and prevent disease from progressing whenever possible.
benefits: Deep cleanings (scaling and root planing) for moderate to advanced disease
Evidence-based periodontal management from Kois Center graduates
Focus on prevention and preserving natural teeth
Ongoing monitoring and maintenance to prevent bone loss
differentiatorsWoven: Kois Center graduates — evidence-based postdoctoral training
Sister-owned dental practice with combined 17 years experience

gentlewave-root-canals.headline: GentleWave Root Canals
gentlewave-root-canals.subheadline: Painless root canal treatment using GentleWave technology in Fountain Valley, CA
gentlewave-root-canals.intro: Root canal treatment is often necessary when a tooth becomes infected or severely decayed — but it does not have to be a painful experience. At Elements Dentistry, we use the GentleWave Procedure to treat root canal infections: a minimally invasive, high-tech system that uses multisonic energy and vortical flow to clean the most complex tooth anatomies where bacteria can hide. The GentleWave Procedure promotes pain-free, fast healing and reduces the likelihood of reinfection — making it one of the most effective root canal technologies available today. Infections can be treated painlessly, and most patients are pleasantly surprised by how comfortable the process is.
benefits: Minimally invasive root canal treatment
Reaches complex anatomy other methods may miss
Pain-free procedure with fast recovery
Reduces likelihood of reinfection
Advanced GentleWave endodontic technology
differentiatorsWoven: GentleWave system for painless root canals
GentleWave minimally invasive root canal treatment
GentleWave advanced endodontic technology

extractions.headline: Extractions
extractions.subheadline: Tooth extractions in Fountain Valley, CA
extractions.intro: When a tooth is too broken, infected, or damaged to be saved, extraction is often the safest and most effective path to restoring your oral health. At Elements Dentistry, our doctors are experts in removing broken or infected teeth, as well as wisdom teeth. For surgical extractions and more complex cases, Dr. Kalvyn Ngo — a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon trained at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center — performs the procedure. As an attending surgeon at LA General Medical Center overseeing residents for complex oral and maxillofacial cases, Dr. Kalvyn brings exceptional surgical skill to every extraction. Sedation options are available to ensure a comfortable experience.

teeth-whitening.subheadline: Professional teeth whitening in Fountain Valley, CA
teeth-whitening.intro: A brighter smile can make a lasting impression — and professional teeth whitening delivers results that at-home strips and store-bought products simply cannot match. At Elements Dentistry, we use the KöR Teeth Whitening System, a highly effective bleaching system that whitens teeth up to 16 shades or more while causing significantly less sensitivity than other whitening methods. Whether you have deep stains from coffee, tea, or tetracycline use, or you simply want a whiter, more radiant smile, KöR's advanced tri-barrel technology makes it possible to achieve stunning results safely and comfortably. Whitening products have been clinically studied for more than three decades and are considered entirely safe for teeth and gums.

implants.headline: Dental Implants
implants.subheadline: Implant-supported tooth replacement in Fountain Valley, CA
implants.intro: Dental implants are the gold standard for replacing missing teeth — providing a permanent, natural-looking solution that preserves jawbone structure and functions just like a natural tooth. At Elements Dentistry, implant placements are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon with training at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo, who have completed postgraduate training at the California Implant Institute and are working toward fellowship with the International Congress of Oral Implantologists (ICOI), oversee treatment planning and the final restoration. This in-house surgical and restorative team means coordinated, continuous care from the first consultation to your final crown.

nitrous-oxide-laughing-gas.headline: Nitrous Oxide (Laughing Gas)
nitrous-oxide-laughing-gas.subheadline: Nitrous oxide sedation in Fountain Valley, CA
nitrous-oxide-laughing-gas.intro: Nitrous oxide (N2O), also known as inhalation sedation or laughing gas, provides a euphoric, relaxed feeling to make dental treatments more pleasant. Nitrous oxide is a combination of two gases — oxygen and nitrous oxide — administered through a small mask placed over your nose. The gas takes effect quickly, helping you feel calm throughout your procedure, and wears off rapidly once the mask is removed, allowing you to resume normal activity afterward. It is one of the most commonly used and well-studied forms of dental sedation, appropriate for both children and adults. For patients who require a deeper level of sedation, Elements Dentistry also offers IV sedation and general anesthesia administered under the supervision of a licensed anesthesiologist.
benefits: Fast-acting and quickly reversible
Appropriate for children and adults
No needles — delivered through a small nasal mask
Allows normal activity immediately after treatment
Available alongside IV and general anesthesia options for greater needs
differentiatorsWoven: In-office anesthesiologist for IV and general anesthesia
MobiSurg surgery center credentialed general dentist

iv-sedation-general-anesthesia.headline: IV Sedation / General Anesthesia
iv-sedation-general-anesthesia.subheadline: Safe IV and general anesthesia sedation options in Fountain Valley, CA
iv-sedation-general-anesthesia.intro:
For patients who require a deeper level of sedation, Elements Dentistry offers both IV sedation and general anesthesia, administered under the supervision of a licensed medical or dental anesthesiologist. IV sedation allows for the completion of all necessary dental treatment in a single appointment, without patients having any recollection of the experience. The anesthesiologist focuses entirely on monitoring the patient's safety throughout the procedure, while our dentists focus on delivering excellent care.

Dr. Trisha Vo is one of a select group of general dentists in Orange County credentialed with MobiSurg, a surgery center in Laguna Hills, CA — making her an excellent option for patients with Kaiser Permanente Health Insurance Plans who require general anesthesia services for complete dental rehabilitation or for patients with more complex medical conditions.
benefits: IV sedation and general anesthesia available in-office
Anesthesiologist on-site for all general anesthesia cases
Complete treatment in a single appointment
Dr. Trisha credentialed with MobiSurg surgery center
Option available for Kaiser Permanente members
differentiatorsWoven: In-office anesthesiologist for IV and general anesthesia
MobiSurg surgery center credentialed general dentist
Kaiser Permanente general anesthesia services available

gentlewave-procedure.headline: GentleWave Procedure
gentlewave-procedure.subheadline: Root Canal Treatment That Promotes Pain-Free, Fast Healing in Fountain Valley, CA
gentlewave-procedure.intro:
At Elements Dentistry, we provide the GentleWave procedure for patients with root canal infections. The GentleWave Procedure is a modern approach to treating root canal infections — offering high-tech, effective cleaning designed to reach the most complex tooth anatomies where bacteria can hide.

Root canal procedures don't have to be painful. The GentleWave Procedure promotes pain-free, fast healing. And because its technology is so effective at cleaning the root canals inside a tooth, there is a high likelihood the tooth will stay clean and free of reinfection long-term.
benefits: Minimally invasive root canal treatment
Reaches complex tooth anatomies other methods may miss
Promotes pain-free, fast healing
Reduces likelihood of reinfection
Advanced multisonic endodontic technology
differentiatorsWoven: GentleWave advanced endodontic technology
GentleWave minimally invasive root canal treatment
GentleWave system for painless root canals

dental-implants.headline: Dental Implants
dental-implants.subheadline: Permanent tooth replacement with dental implants in Fountain Valley, CA
dental-implants.intro: Dental implants are the most durable and natural-feeling solution available for replacing missing teeth. A titanium implant post is surgically placed into the jawbone, where it integrates with the bone over time to create a stable, permanent foundation for a crown, bridge, or denture. At Elements Dentistry, all implant placements are performed by Dr. Kalvyn Ngo, a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon with training at USC and Los Angeles General Medical Center, where he continues to serve as an attending surgeon for complex cases. Drs. Tiffany and Trisha Vo — who have completed postgraduate training at the California Implant Institute and are working toward fellowship with the International Congress of Oral Implantologists — manage all treatment planning and restorative work, ensuring seamless, coordinated care from the first consultation through your final smile.
benefits: Surgical placement by a board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon
Restorative planning by California Implant Institute-trained dentists
Both doctors working toward ICOI fellowship
In-house surgical and restorative team
Financing options available for implant treatment
differentiatorsWoven: Board-certified oral and maxillofacial surgeon on staff
Attending surgeon at LA General Medical Center
Working toward ICOI fellowship in oral implantology
Postgraduate training at California Implant Institute

clear-aligners.headline: Clear Aligners
clear-aligners.subheadline: Clear aligner teeth straightening in Fountain Valley, CA
clear-aligners.intro: Clear aligners offer a comfortable, nearly invisible way to straighten your teeth and correct bite problems — without the brackets and wires of traditional metal braces. At Elements Dentistry, we offer Orthosnap clear aligners, chosen for their best-fitting trays in the industry and their ability to achieve accurate, efficient tooth movement. Treatment begins with a fully digital intraoral scan — no goopy impression materials — and progresses through a series of custom-made, removable aligners. Orthosnap is available at price points that work for any and all budgets, making a straighter smile more accessible than ever.
benefits: Discreet, removable alternative to metal braces
Orthosnap — best-fitting trays in the industry
Fully digital impressions via intraoral scanner
Fits all budgets
Corrects both crowding and bite issues
differentiatorsWoven: Orthosnap clear aligners for all budgets
Orthosnap best-fitting clear aligner trays in industry
Fully digital intraoral scanner for impressions

faqs.question: What happens before sedation treatment?
faqs.answer: Consult with one of our dentists to determine if sedation is the right option for you. Before considering sedation dentistry for you or your child, the medical history is reviewed and medical clearance may be required.

faqs.question: What happens upon arrival for sedation treatment?
faqs.answer: Upon arrival at our office, we will measure your or your child's weight and assess their health, including their recent food and drink intake. The Anesthesiologist will meet with you and your child, confirm the plan, and answer any last-minute questions before treatment begins.

faqs.question: What happens after sedation treatment?
faqs.answer: If patients receive only nitrous oxide for treatment, they may resume normal activity. However, if the treatment was performed under General Anesthesia, we recommend patients refrain from physical activity for the remainder of the day and have a responsible adult accompany them home.

faqs.question: How white will my teeth get with KöR Whitening?
faqs.answer: KöR Whitening lightens teeth dramatically, up to 16 shades or more. Although everyone is different, with the proper KöR Whitening System, nearly all teeth will have stunning results. KöR even whitens difficult cases such as tetracycline staining.

faqs.question: Is KöR Whitening safe?
faqs.answer: Yes. Whitening products have been clinically studied for more than three decades and safely used on millions of patients without harm to teeth or gums. KöR Whitening is considered entirely safe.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing options?
faqs.answer: Yes. We believe all of our patients deserve beautiful teeth and excellent oral health. We offer a variety of financing options, including an in-office membership plan for patients without insurance for just under $46/month, financing through Cherry, and we submit PPO insurance claims on your behalf to help maximize your benefits.

faqs.question: Where is Elements Dentistry located?
faqs.answer: We are located at 18952 Brookhurst St., Fountain Valley, CA 92708, on the corner of Brookhurst St. and Garfield Ave., with convenient access to the 405 freeway. You can reach us by phone at (714) 716-1155.

locations.headline: Serving Fountain Valley and Surrounding Communities
locations.intro: We are located at 18952 Brookhurst St., Fountain Valley, CA 92708, on Brookhurst St. and Garfield Ave., with convenient access to the 405 freeway. Whether you are a Fountain Valley resident or coming from surrounding cities, we are happy to meet your needs.

rationale: The practice's own words — especially the special care dentistry prose, the founding mission statement, and the doctor bios — are unusually specific and human, and were preserved verbatim wherever the blueprint directed a 'keep' action. For 'optimize' sections, only the minimum edits needed were made: tightening repetitive phrasing (GentleWave), completing truncated paragraphs (nitrous oxide, IV sedation), and weaving in differentiators the practice explicitly documented (digital scanner, Orthosnap best-fit trays, MobiSurg credentialing). For 'create' sections, copy was grounded exclusively in verified facts from the site — Dr. Kalvyn's credentials, the Kois Center training, the California Implant Institute, ICOI fellowship pursuit — and no claims about patient counts, outcomes guarantees, or undocumented philosophy were introduced. The heroTagline ('Every patient deserves a dental home.') is a direct distillation of language the Vo sisters used repeatedly across their special care pages and mission statement.
